title: papaver alpinum subvar. sulphurellum
intro: Papaver alpinum subvar. sulphurellum, also known as the Sulphur Poppy or Yellow Alpine Poppy, is a variety of the Alpine Poppy plant that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Papaver alpinum subvar. sulphurellum include relieving pain and reducing inflammation, as well as treating respiratory and digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's medicinal properties are often extracted and used in teas, tinctures, and salves to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
